symptom: a steadily swelling abdomen mistaken for weight gain or pregnancy
hook: a single enormous fluid filled balloon was filling almost the whole abdomen and pushing the bowel aside
whatYouSee: A huge smooth mass filling most of the abdomen and pushing the bowel gas out to the edges.
whyItMatters: A benign ovarian cyst can grow to fill the whole abdomen and most are benign but a few hide a cancer so it always needs assessment.
treatment: Treatment is surgical removal with histology to exclude malignancy.
takeaway: A giant smooth mass filling the abdomen and shoving bowel to the sides is a massive ovarian cyst.

generated.threadsCaption:
A patient came in with a steadily swelling abdomen mistaken for weight gain or pregnancy.

Then the X-ray loaded 😭

And a single enormous fluid filled balloon was filling almost the whole abdomen and pushing the bowel aside.

Quick diagnosis challenge 🩻

What's the most likely diagnosis?

Wild guesses are welcome 👀
generated.threadsAnswer:
Answer: Massive ovarian cyst

👀 What you see:
A huge smooth mass filling most of the abdomen and pushing the bowel gas out to the edges.

🦴 Why it matters:
A benign ovarian cyst can grow to fill the whole abdomen and most are benign but a few hide a cancer so it always needs assessment.

📝 Takeaway:
A giant smooth mass filling the abdomen and shoving bowel to the sides is a massive ovarian cyst.

💊 Treatment:
Treatment is surgical removal with histology to exclude malignancy.
